div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Brazil (Caffery)
div.p: A–831. Department’s 2721, September 15, 1942, 10 p.m.Ibid., p. 717. What progress is being made to curtail production of non-essential rubber products through a system of government control?

Korkegi’s recent memorandum to Cooke,Memorandum not found in Department files; Mr. Korkegi and Mr. Cooke were officials of the Rubber Reserve Company. Rubber Reserve, poses the question of whether immediate limitation can best be accomplished by a Rubber Reserve program of purchasing or governmental decree or both. What appears to be the chance of any action in the near future on part of Brazilian Government?
